changes.reason: Activate one dormant pin-avoid concept inside the VALID_0DTE router as an attribution probe while preserving all existing active valid-0DTE profiles and their ordering context.

Test whether the existing dormant playbook can identify charm-wall/pin-avoid states that currently appear inside the tail-heavy charm_pin_pullback_long and charm_wall_breakaway_long sleeves without adding global veto pressure.
Keep the profitable charm-pin engine active so the experiment measures routing/cannibalization rather than disabling the known 34-trade, 1325.1 PnL edge.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should reveal whether dormant pin-avoid routing can isolate a distinct VALID_0DTE charm/pin risk state, ideally reducing combined charm-pin/charm-wall tail MAE or adding positive standalone attribution while preserving total net profit. The tradeoff is cannibalization of fast charm-pin winners; reject unless total net profit retains at least 98% of run_029, protected fast-winner retention stays high, and slow_12h remains zero.
recommendation.label: pin-avoid-attribution-probe
recommendation.rationale: Use the concept-activation exception as one logical strategy-profile family. The best base remains run_029; recent direct charm-wall geometry with a VWAP cap hurt score and profit, while broad hidden-signature pruning sacrifices too much PnL. The persistent unresolved risk is charm/pin tail behavior: charm_pin_pullback_long owns the -513.4 worst MAE but is also profitable and fast, so a dormant pin-avoid attribution test is cleaner than another global veto or static extension cap.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced 34 VALID_0DTE trades, 1325.1 PnL, 200.35 PnL/exposure hour, and fast 3.8 minute median hold, but owns the global -513.4 MAE. charm_wall_breakaway_long adds convex PnL but is fragile after recent geometry tuning. The strategist explicitly identified dormant pin-avoid routing as a config-only attribution probe.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Dormant Activation Probe
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The dormant profile may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize protected fast charm-pin/charm-wall winners without improving MAE or total score.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm/pin context where current charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long entries show pin-avoid or rejection risk.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE, total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, completed trades do not fall more than 10%, protected fast-winner retention remains >=95%, and slow_12h remains 0.
